meta.purpose: Nano Banana high-fidelity texture prompts for Bento Grid components

assets.prompt: Ultra-subtle noise texture on pure black (#000000). Barely visible grain pattern, like expensive matte paper. No color, only monochrome micro-noise at 3% opacity. 1024x1024 seamless tile.

assets.usage: Background texture for Bento Grid cards
assets.prompt: Dark obsidian stone surface texture. Nearly black with very faint crystalline highlights. Medical-grade, sterile feel. Flat lighting, no reflections. 1024x1024 seamless.

assets.usage: Agent indicator: Jenny the Diagnostic Surgeon
assets.prompt: Minimalist geometric icon of a female silhouette in surgical green (#00ff41) on transparent background. Clean lines, no detail, just the outline suggesting authority and calm. 256x256 PNG.

assets.usage: Agent indicator: Mark the ROI Architect
assets.prompt: Minimalist geometric icon of a male silhouette in surgical green (#00ff41) on transparent background. Sharp angular lines suggesting technical precision and authority. 256x256 PNG.

assets.usage: Icon for revenue leak findings in audit grid
assets.prompt: Abstract downward-flowing liquid dropping through a crack in a surface. Surgical green on black. Minimal, geometric, icon-sized. 128x128 PNG transparent background.
Subtle grid pattern on pure black. Very faint surgical green lines forming a coordinate system. 512x512 seamless tile. Medical monitor aesthetic.
